memory.name: paged_kv_gather

memory.name: batched_sparse_row_gather
memory.description: Batched sparse row gather from token-major storage.

memory.name: layout_transform_copy
memory.description: Copy data while transforming its logical layout.

masking.description: Apply causal masking over query-key score layouts.

masking.name: ragged_mask
masking.description: Apply per-batch validity masking over query-key score layouts.

masking.description: Apply boundary masking to partial tiles at block edges.

reductions.description: Compute a local sum over a row or block of values.

reductions.name: online_softmax
reductions.description: Compute softmax through a numerically stable running reduction.

numerics.name: welford_variance
numerics.description: Compute row-wise mean and variance using numerically stable running statistics.
